hero_subtitle: AI-powered. Adaptive. Fraud-proof. Verified. One test. One score. Unlimited opportunities.
problem_headline: The world's first AI-powered adaptive test designed for real-world hiring.
problem_body: CrismaTest isn't a quiz. It's a complete evaluation system that measures what actually matters — the skills, reasoning, and reliability that make someone great at their job.
problem_feat_1_desc: Tailored questions matched to the exact role being tested
problem_feat_2_desc: Evaluate critical thinking and analytical capabilities under pressure
problem_feat_3_desc: Assess written and verbal clarity, structure, and tone
problem_feat_4_desc: Understand work style, motivation, and cultural alignment
problem_feat_5_desc: Advanced AI detection ensures responses are genuine and unassisted
problem_feat_6_desc: Optional video questions for deeper candidate insight
solution_sub: From test to verified score in minutes. Your CrismaScore is portable, universal, and trusted by employers worldwide.
solution_step_1_desc: Adaptive, dynamic, and secure. Complete your AI-powered assessment in just 10–15 minutes from any device.
solution_step_2_desc: Receive a universal score from 0–100 measuring your skills and potential — broken down into LogicScore, CommsScore, JobSkillScore, and TrustScore.
solution_step_3_desc: Use your CrismaScore when applying to jobs anywhere in the world — on CrismaWork, LinkedIn, Indeed, and with any employer worldwide.
features_sub: CrismaTest gives you objective, fraud-proof scores in under 15 minutes — so you can focus on the candidates who actually qualify.
features_col1_1: Filter candidates instantly — rank applicants by CrismaScore the moment results come in
features_col1_2: Reduce interview time by 70% — only meet pre-qualified candidates who passed your assessment
features_col1_3: Eliminate fraud & ChatGPT misuse — AI proctoring detects cheating attempts in real time
features_col1_4: Compare candidates objectively — side-by-side score breakdowns remove bias and enable data-driven decisions
features_col2_1: Use adaptive job-specific tests — tests automatically adjust based on role requirements
features_col2_2: Add optional video questions — assess communication and presence with integrated video modules
features_col2_3: Access a global talent pool — browse verified candidates who have completed CrismaTest
crismascore_headline: A single, universal score that companies trust.
crismascore_sub: CrismaScore is not just a number. It's a verified, portable, AI-generated profile of a candidate's real capabilities — built from five dimensions of evaluation.
crismascore_footer: One test. One score. Trusted by recruiters worldwide.
crismascore_logic_desc: Reasoning ability, pattern recognition, and analytical problem-solving
crismascore_comm_desc: Written and verbal clarity, analysis, tone, and persuasiveness
crismascore_trust_desc: Anti-fraud stability — consistency, behavioral patterns, and AI-verified authenticity
crismascore_video_desc: Communication clarity, presence, and clarity from video responses
antifraud_headline: No more cheating. No more uncertainty.
antifraud_sub: CrismaTest uses real-time AI proctoring to ensure every score reflects genuine, unassisted performance. Every session is monitored, analyzed, and verified — transparently.
antifraud_footer: All detected behaviors are flagged transparently in the candidate's report. No hidden penalties — just honest data for better decisions.
tests_sub: Choose from our growing library of job-specific assessments — each designed to evaluate the exact skills that matter for that role.
faq_1_a: CrismaTest combines six evaluation dimensions — logic, communication, job skills, behavioral indicators, anti-fraud consistency, and optional video — to produce a holistic score with significantly higher predictive validity than traditional CV screening.
faq_2_a: Most candidates complete the full test in 10 to 15 minutes. The adaptive format means the test adjusts to your responses — no two sessions are identical.
faq_3_a: CrismaTest uses real-time AI proctoring that monitors webcam activity, tab switching, typing patterns, copy/paste behavior, audio environment, and secondary screen usage. Any anomalies are flagged in the candidate's TrustScore breakdown.
faq_4_a: Yes. Companies on Starter, Pro, and Enterprise plans can use the Test Builder to select specific modules, adjust question focus, and add up to 3 custom questions — all without any technical configuration.
faq_5_a: Absolutely. Your CrismaScore is valid for 12 months. You can share it via a unique profile link, embed it on LinkedIn, or send it directly to any employer — anywhere in the world. Free plan candidates receive 2 free retests.
contact_sub: Have a question or want to learn more? We'd love to hear from you.
contact_message_placeholder: Tell us how we can help...
cta_headline: Take the test. Get your score. Open more doors.
cta_sub: Join thousands of candidates who have already validated their skills with CrismaTest. Free to start.
footer_tagline: The global standard for talent assessment.
